stadium.name: Dark Tree Field
stadium.description: Located in the Cold North of Mundos Ferox, Mellondor’s settlement of Dark Tree lacks the funds for a proper stadium, but nature has provided a rugged open field just outside the settlement. The field is completely exposed to the elements, meaning players must contend with freezing rain, sheets of ice, and the tree's own grasping roots, while spectators warm themselves with blankets and campfires around the perimeter.

stats.pregame_ritual: Attempting to communicate with birds.
Eating a dandelion, stem and all.
Mimicking the call of the regional 'Gloom-Lark' for courage.
Painting a crude, snarling face on their stomach.
Tying a small, hand-carved wooden bird to their gear.
Trying to teach a stray dog a complicated and useless new trick.
Attempting to communicate with birds.
Eating a piece of honeycomb to 'sweeten' their victory.
Chewing on tree bark.
Chewing on a splinter of wood from a past goal basket.
Balancing the Trollball on their head for a full minute.

stadium.name: The Guilder's Field
stadium.description: An opulent stadium sponsored by the powerful Church of Pecune. The stands feature luxurious, velvet-lined boxes for bankers, who are often more focused on making deals than the game.

stats.pregame_ritual: Washing their hands with dirt.
Eating a dandelion, stem and all.
Lighting a small piece of parchment on fire and inhaling the smoke.
Meticulously cleaning each stud on their boots with a special brush.
Eating a raw onion, layer by layer, without crying.
Getting a teammate to pour a bucket of cold water over their head.
A team-wide moment of absolute silence to 'gather their thoughts'.
Sharpening the edges of their blunted weapon (an exercise in futility).
Humming a tune they believe only they know.
Lighting a small piece of parchment on fire and inhaling the smoke.
Avoiding eye contact with anyone wearing the color green.

preGame: Hear ye, hear ye, and prepare your very souls, for the grandest contest of the week is upon us! Tonight, in the magnificent, velvet-draped confines of The Guilder's Field, we witness a clash of titans that could decide the fate of this entire Best-of-Five series! We have the rising power, the financial juggernaut, **The New Prosperity Profits**, battling the rugged, untamed fury of **The Dark Tree Demon Kids**! The stands, overflowing with the wealthy elite of the Church of Pecune, seem ready to trade the action for a profitable land deal, but tonight, even they must witness the glorious carnage of Trollball! And oh, the drama! The elements themselves are conspiring against the hopefuls, as freezing rain lashes down and slick ice threatens to send every glorious warrior tumbling! Before the whistle blows, we see the incredible Healer for **The New Prosperity Profits**, **Merissa Mathian**, performing her solemn ritual—washing her hands in the sacred, honest dirt! It’s a beautiful contrast to the polished marble beneath her feet! Will **The New Prosperity Profits** leverage their financial clout to crush the North's defenders, or will **The Dark Tree Demon Kids** prove that sheer grit can overcome even the most opulent stage? This is going to be a bloodbath, folks! A glorious, beautiful bloodbath!
postGame:
And there you have it, folks! What a spectacular, savage spectacle! The horns have sounded, the trolls have clashed, and the **New Prosperity Profits** have asserted their dominance in a bruising three-to-nil victory over **The Dark Tree Demon Kids**! The field, a treacherous mix of shimmering frost and snaking tendrils of the ancient wood, forced every warrior to fight on every inch of turf! The action started with the relentless **The New Prosperity Profits** putting on a clinic! **Gladdie Farika** was simply unstoppable, sliding across the slick surface, only to be immediately tangled by a root as he surged forward! But it was the precision of **Milman Galvan** that truly set the tone, driving his spear through the fray in the center zone! 

The first major blow came when **Pellikka Concettina** brought down **Daniyal Velda** with a thunderous collision, sending her sprawling! Yet, even amidst the chaos—and with **Bilski Sells** instantly hauling **Daniyal Velda** back into the fray—the attack continued! Later, in the home territory, **Aufmann Tedric** delivered a perfect pass that found **Boleslaw Heathcote** right in the scoring territory, who hammered the leather head into the net for a single point! The **Dark Tree Demon Kids** looked momentarily shaken, but the war wasn't over! 

As we lumbered toward the break, the battle intensified! The elements seemed determined to halt the charge, freezing rain plastered to every sweaty brow! **Far Studner** slid uncontrollably, trying in vain to wipe the icy misery from their eyes, while **Shinberg Weasner** struggled to keep pace! But the second half belonged entirely to the financial titans! After **Merissa Mathian** revived **Gladdie Farika**, the scoring resumed! **Boleslaw Heathcote** seized the moment, launching a mighty shot from the home line that sailed through the goal posts for two magnificent points! 

The final minutes saw the brutality reach fever pitch! **Jarid Tudela** tried to bring down **Pellikka Concettina**, but **Milman Galvan** countered with a wild pass that was expertly intercepted by **Pulchi Benyamin**! The **Dark Tree Demon Kids** fought valiantly, but they simply could not stop the surge! **The New Prosperity Profits** take the win, 3-0! A masterful performance that proves that even when the wealthy bankers in the stands start smelling opportunity, the raw power of **The New Prosperity Profits** is too magnificent to ignore! Go **New Prosperity Profits**! May their coffers never run dry!
